ability.name: Stellar Slash
ability.description: Slash in a wide arc dealing physical damage to nearby enemies. Heal for a portion of damage dealt.

ability.name: Star Strike
ability.description: Reposition to strike the most enemies. Throw piercing kunai dealing physical damage.

ability.name: Deathbeam
ability.description: Channel a deathbeam in a line towards target. Deals magic damage per second, ignores % of enemy Magic Resist.

ability.name: Hopped-Up Hacks
ability.description: Open a hex rift, Hacking enemies within for X seconds dealing magic damage.

ability.name: Ultra Friendly Object
ability.description: Summon a UFO over target dealing magic damage per second. Extra damage to Tanks. Can abduct dead enemies and create copies.

ability.name: Tidal Slashes
ability.description: Unleash a flurry of slashes at the current target, dealing physical damage each.

ability.name: Party Crasher
ability.description: Passive: Call bolts on high HP enemies. Active: Summon disco ball, uppercut target into it dealing AoE magic damage. Enter the Groove.

ability.name: Fish Frenzy
ability.description: Passive: For every % missing Health, gain Attack Speed. Active: Deal physical damage to the target.

ability.name: Aim For The Head
ability.description: Fire a headshot at the farthest enemy dealing physical damage. If it kills, refund mana.

ability.name: Devour
ability.description: Deal magic damage to the lowest Health enemy in range and permanently gain max Health. If this kills them, gain even more max Health.

ability.name: Asteroid Blaster
ability.description: Strafe to a nearby position, unleashing missiles dealing physical damage.

ability.name: Pale Cascade
ability.description: Passive: Attacks deal bonus magic damage. Active: Gain Shield and summon 3 orbiting orbs dealing magic damage.

ability.name: Temporal Shot
ability.description: Fire a blast at the current target dealing physical damage. Every X takedowns, gain a drone that deals physical damage on cast.

ability.name: Perfect Bladework
ability.description: Passive: Every X attacks reveal a Vital. Dash to attack it for true damage and heal. Active: Reveal all Vitals and attack them rapidly.

ability.name: Slingshot Maneuver
ability.description: Every 5th attack, launch a returning boomerang dealing physical damage. Meep Bonus: Meeps attack alongside Gnar.

ability.name: Chemical Rage
ability.description: Heal over time, then deal magic damage to adjacent enemies and Chill them (reduce Attack Speed 30%).

ability.name: Dance n' Dice
ability.description: Passive: Attacks deal magic damage. Active: Dash and snip the lowest HP enemy. If kill, dash and snip again.

ability.name: Test of Spirit
ability.description: Gain Shield. Drain Health from nearest enemies. Then slam down dealing magic damage to enemies within 2 hexes.

ability.name: Space Opera
ability.description: Passive: Fixed attack speed, converts bonus AS into AD. Active: Summon spectral hands that fire alongside Jhin.

ability.name: Fishbones!
ability.description: Fire a barrage of bullets in a cone, each dealing physical damage to the first target hit.

ability.name: Bullet Cluster
ability.description: Passive: On takedown, gain mana. Active: Fire missiles around the current target dealing physical damage.

ability.name: Singularity
ability.description: Gather black hole force dealing magic damage split between target and closest enemies.

ability.name: Cosmic Pursuit
ability.description: Passive: Attacks/Abilities mark targets. At X marks, Wolf consumes them for physical damage. Active: Jump and fire arrows.

ability.name: Fracture Reality
ability.description: Passive: Attacks deal magic damage instead. Active: Summon clones that attack alongside LeBlanc, firing bolts of magic damage.

ability.name: Shield of Daybreak
ability.description: Gain Shield for 4 seconds. Bash the current target, dealing magic damage and stunning them.

ability.name: Dark Matter
ability.description: Hurl a dagger towards the target dealing magic damage. The dagger explodes dealing AoE magic damage.

ability.name: It's Raining Stars
ability.description: Passive: Spell gains a different secondary effect each game. Active: Call down something from the sky dealing magic damage with a special effect.

ability.name: Grasp of Convergence
ability.description: Passive: Gain more max HP from all sources. Active: Converge vines on target dealing magic damage and stunning.

ability.name: Psi Strikes
ability.description: Passive: Every 3rd attack strikes extra. Active: Enter Psi-State gaining Omnivamp, Attack Speed, and firing psychic projections.

ability.name: ULTRA MEGA TIME KICK
ability.description: Kick a ball at an enemy dealing magic damage. Ball bounces to new targets with halving odds per bounce.

ability.name: Indestructible
ability.description: Gain shield. Each second gain more shield and deal magic damage to adjacent enemies. Heal when ability ends.

ability.name: Dark Form
ability.description: Transform gaining Shield. Tether nearest enemies dealing magic damage per second and healing.

ability.name: Bubble Pop
ability.description: Toss a disco bubble dealing split damage in AoE. Sends globs to nearby enemies. On cast, enter the Groove.

ability.name: Groovin' Susan
ability.description: Transform temporarily, gaining max Health and dealing magic damage to adjacent enemies each second.

ability.name: Calamity
ability.description: Gain Shield. Summon astrolabe crashing on most enemies dealing magic damage. Push astrolabe across board, knocking up enemies.

ability.name: Disco Inferno
ability.description: Passive: On combat start, forge a temp completed item or make one Radiant. Active: Gain Shield, breathe fire in a cone.

ability.name: Advanced Defences
ability.description: Gain Shield and Durability. Deal physical damage each second to enemies in a cone.

ability.name: Huddle Up!
ability.description: Throw her buckler at the farthest enemy dealing magic damage. The buckler then bounces to nearby allies, granting them a Shield.

ability.name: Marked for Death
ability.description: Throw harpoon at furthest enemy, pull them forward. Teleport behind them and cleave for physical damage.

ability.name: Upheaval
ability.description: Heal, then briefly knock up adjacent enemies and deal magic damage.

ability.name: Alien Scythe
ability.description: Gain Durability, healing over duration. Slash forward in a line dealing physical damage and knocking enemies up.

ability.name: Jump and Jive
ability.description: Passive: Shoot knocked-up enemies for physical damage. Active: Volley bullets at target dealing physical damage and knocking up.

ability.name: Reality Tear
ability.description: Passive: Attacks gain stacking bonus magic damage. Active: Gain Shield, slice open a rift dealing damage. Slows enemy AS, buffs ally AS.

ability.name: Psionic Crush
ability.description: Hurl magnetic debris at targets dealing magic damage. When debris-carrying enemy dies, it passes on.

ability.name: Diviner's Judgment
ability.description: Stab the target causing bleed for physical damage. After the attack, leap to the highest HP enemy nearby.

ability.name: Double Time
ability.description: Passive: Attacks deal bonus magic damage with stacking DoT. Active: Gain Attack Speed for X attacks.

ability.name: Gravity Matrix
ability.description: Enter defensive stance gaining Durability. Attract nearby projectiles and heal. Release shockwave dealing physical damage.

ability.name: Fate's Gambit
ability.description: Draw a card (1-9), throw it at target dealing variable magic damage. Overkill damage bounces to nearest enemy.

ability.name: Unstoppable Dreadnought
ability.description: Passive: Proximity Blast fires cone damage when enemies approach. Active: Gain Shield and dash behind current target.

ability.name: Meepteor Shower
ability.description: Call down a Meepteor dealing magic damage. Meep Bonus: Additional mini Meepteors on nearby targets.

ability.name: Lend Me a Hand, Shadow!
ability.description: Passive: Every attack, Shadow strikes a nearby enemy dealing magic damage. Active: Shadow launches empowered strikes.

ability.name: Psionic Storm
ability.description: Channel a psionic storm that follows enemies for X seconds, growing larger and dealing magic damage.

ability.name: Stellar Ricochet
ability.description: Passive: Attacks bounce X times, leaving Feathers. Active: Gain Attack Speed, then recall all Feathers dealing physical damage.

ability.name: Quantum Clone
ability.description: Create a clone behind the target with reduced max Health. Clone inherits items, stats, and current Health, and can cast Quantum Clone.

ability.name: Paddle Star
ability.description: Fire a paddle star dealing magic damage. It redirects to a distant enemy, repeating damage X times.
